TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_pa-li_sen-mu-yun, title = pa-li_sen-mu-yun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/pa-li_sen-mu-yun} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ś∑īťĽéŤĀĖśĮćťôĘpa-li sen-mu-yun nilaculan pa-li sen-mu-yun u imi nida pa-li sen-mu, u tatengaay nida a nganga sa pa-li sen-mu kitidaan nu kiwkay tini i hu-wa-ku-pa-li saka sip nu si-ti a subal nu tinsukiw a kiwkay, u tinsukiw a kitidaan nu kiwkay, nayi 1163 a mihcaan anisangaan katukih 1250 a mihcaan, nu ke-te-se aluma' nu huwalan-si a subal nu kitidaan nu ketese alalihayay nu kapahay a kitidaan, idaw kunisabaluhay nipisangan tu madicemay hida sikululay, tabaki yadah ku kulit hida nu balu ku sasingalan yadah ku kulit nalimaan misanga tu salining tini i pa-li mala mikutayay tu ngangan nu naemekan nu mukasi, tungusay tu aidangan atu lalihayan nu kitidaan. mangaleb nu huwa-ku matineng naming ku matinengayatademaw, tu mihmihcaan tayniay midang nu tademaw makaala tu cay tusepsep a emang ku tayniay midang tina pa-li sen-mu-yun, kyu mala pali sayadahay nu tayniay a aaidangan. . Sen-mu-yun i 1163 amihcaan i mulise.te.su-li a cu-ciyaw mukeliday malingatu misanga, nayi 1260 a mihcaan maedem namisanga tu kitidaan, kanahatu nadikuda pina tu a siki amisumad tu kawaw, nika i 1790 a mihcaan u huwa-ku malepacaw henay itawya, yapali-se-mu-yun macalap mapeci, kyu yadahay a kiwkay nu wayway mamin mapeci. nanu 19 a sikimalingatu, pasu ci na-pi-lun saka cay yu pakasitangah a pacuung sa nu lisin sa atu huwalan-si a kanatal atu katuuday a cung-tung yu pitademan nu cung-tung itini aca i sen-mu-yun a sikawaw. i sen-mu-yun nu panan ihekal putah nu sen-mu-yun sa, idaw ku nu sayaway a sapakining, nu huwa-ku aniditekan tu nu kanatal a sausi kyu tini malingatu, sisa idaw kunu hu-wa-ku a imi. (Point Z√©ro)ÁīÄŚŅĶÁČ©, . nu huwa-ku a pangangan sa "sen-mu-yun" han ui minida sa "u tatayna nu mita" sanay , mutudu tu ci yisuan a wina sen-mu-ma-li-ya, masasusikad yu singangan mangalen i tipanay a kanatal u kamu nuheni, wiy-ke-tu.yi-ku anisulitan tu cuda " mahicaay a tademaw" kyu wiyni ku sapangangan. se-mu-yun yumahidahenay matabal nu ayawan nu caysep a siki sa, malanu pa-li tuway, atu maminay nu pilihayan nu hu-wa-ku a kitidaan. . nika, yumahida henay usutudung, makatepa ku tademaw t usen-se-te-wang a kiwkay atu mamukun tu cayay katatudung sa, macunus aca tunu kiwkay malawpes ku demiad maluman, kya malingatu midateng tu ahican muliyaw misanga tina kiwkay sa. 1160 amihcaan, pali nu tudung a kiwkay mu-lise.te. suli "Maurice de Sully" patideng palekal mikiyaku, kyu 1163 a mihcaan sayaway a patucek tu sapaneknek a baetu, ngy malingatu tu a misanga tu kiwkay. nika, u mahiniay awcima ku sasitungusay a patektek tina sen-mu yun yadah ku kamu, ci mu-li-se. te. Su-li u tatusiyamen nu tawyaay a tademaw, idaw kukamu sakamusa ci ciyaw-cung ya-li-san-ta ku sisikiningay sa, nika ianayay ku sulit itawya, u sen-mu-yun nu sayaway numisangaay nawcima hakiya, inayay ku tungus tu nipisulit. 2019 amihcaan 4tay abulad 15 a demiad 18 kutuki 50 a sasulitan itawya, imahida misanga tu tina pa-li se-mu -yun makatuduh, nikatuduh mamin atuduh ku badahung nu kiwkay a tu masamucu'ay, nika u tektek nu kiwkay kapah tu naming. ukamu itawya, makatuduh sa misanga tu a musumad . nikatuduh nayi labu nu kiwkay a didiai a tumunaw sa. nadikudan nama katuduhmiliyaw misangaŚ§ßÁĀęťĀéŚĺĆÁöĄťáćŚĽļpatucek tu kamu cinid a miliyaw aca misanga tina pa-li-sen-mu-yun sa, mikiyaku tu lim a mihcaan amuhamin masanga tinakawaw sa. muliyaw misanga itawya t usen-mu-yun u nalimaan padeng han henay mulimad taydaen i lu-hu-kung a mikuwan. pakatineng cinida amikawaw tu masasetset misanga sa, yakamunida maydih muliyaw mitadas misanga atu badahung. namahida sa, patineng tu sapisasetset sakalamkam sa pakatineng tu pahusuay nika patinekuan, u mikuwanay tu nisupedan tu namiecaway a tademaw mutudu' tu huwa-ku a cen-hu tadakalankam a misumad tu tukung sa, cay pakaadih tu sapisumad pasu maminay a sasangaan atu pisangaan a demiad u micukaymasay nu say-ku nicaliwayay. 2009 a mihcaan sen-mu-yun nu timulan nu kawiyli atu namakatuduh tu sakatu a demiad i kawana, u tungduh nu sen-mu-yun atu nu kilangay a tukun mamin matuduhnamahida namakatuduh sa cay katenes, huwaku-cung-tung ci make-hungÁĄ∂ŤÄĆ, . ina sapamata a baluhay a hulic misakaloamkam malingatu mitadas, ngay pa-li-sen-mu-yun kucay ka idaw ku lalangawan tu nipaliwan sapisikul atu sapisumad nu hulic atu hicaen, imahini sa macuduh aca malakuwiyt ku 1170 nu liwan a zaysang u namiecaway pasayda ci ma-ke-hungan patigami tu nipahelak, musakamu sasikadi ku hulic sa. . Ina lutuc nu hulic sa nayi 2019 amihcaan 5ay abulad 11 ademiad, misulul, nayi hu-wa-ku milubang tunu kamuculculay sa sakamusa pisalalamkami ti sikawaw atu miselep tu damsu ngay muculcul tu kapahay ku balucu' nu masakaputay a pahaykiw sa. natal macalilaw kuni kasacacalilaw.u cayay pisulil ci makehungan sa mutudu' tu cen-hu miliyung tu pa-li sen-mu a kiykay pataluayaw tu kawaw nu cen-c' sa, u
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == *****pa-r~…ĺi s…ôn-mu-jun nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan pa-r~…ĺi s…ôn-mu-jun u imi nida pa-r~…ĺi s…ôn-mu, u tat…ôŇčaaj nida a ŇčaŇča sa pa-r~…ĺi s…ôn-mu kitidaan nu kiwkaj tini i ńßu-wa-ku-pa-r~…ĺi saka sip nu si-ti a subar~…ĺ nu tinsukiw a kiwkaj, u tinsukiw a kitidaan nu kiwkaj, naji **** a mińß ¶aan anisaŇčaan katukińß **** a mińß ¶aan, nu k…ô-t…ô-s…ô ar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßuwar~…ĺan-si a subar~…ĺ nu kitidaan nu k…ôt…ôs…ô ar~…ĺar~…ĺińßajaj nu kapańßaj a kitidaan, idaw kunisabar~…ĺuńßaj nipisaŇčan tu madi ¶…ômaj ńßida sikur~…ĺur~…ĺaj, tabaki jadańß ku kur~…ĺit ńßida nu bar~…ĺu ku sasiŇčar~…ĺan jadańß ku kur~…ĺit nar~…ĺimaan misaŇča tu sar~…ĺiniŇč tini i pa-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺa mikutajaj tu ŇčaŇčan nu na…ôm…ôkan nu mukasi, tuŇčusaj tu aidaŇčan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺińßajan nu kitidaan. maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb nu ńßuwa-ku matin…ôŇč namiŇč ku matin…ôŇčajatad…ômaw, tu mińßmińß ¶aan tajniaj midaŇč nu tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu ¶aj tus…ôps…ôp a …ômaŇč ku tajniaj midaŇč tina pa-r~…ĺi s…ôn-mu-jun, kju mar~…ĺa par~…ĺi sajadańßaj nu tajniaj a aaidaŇčan. . s…ôn-mu-jun i **** amińß ¶aan i mur~…ĺis…ô.t…ô.su-r~…ĺi a ¶u- ¶ijaw muk…ôr~…ĺidaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu misaŇča, naji **** a mińß ¶aan ma…ôd…ôm namisaŇča tu kitidaan, kanańßatu nadikuda pina tu a siki amisumad tu kawaw, nika i **** a mińß ¶aan u ńßuwa-ku mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ńß…ônaj itawja, japar~…ĺi-s…ô-mu-jun ma ¶ar~…ĺap map…ô ¶i, kju jadańßaj a kiwkaj nu wajwaj mamin map…ô ¶i. nanu ** a sikimar~…ĺiŇčatu, pasu ¶i na-pi-r~…ĺun saka ¶aj ju pakasitaŇčańß a pa ¶uuŇč sa nu r~…ĺisin sa atu ńßuwar~…ĺan-si a kanatar~…ĺ atu katuudaj a ¶uŇč-tuŇč ju pitad…ôman nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč itini a ¶a i s…ôn-mu-jun a sikawaw. i s…ôn-mu-jun nu panan ińß…ôkar~…ĺ putańß nu s…ôn-mu-jun sa, idaw ku nu sajawaj a sapakiniŇč, nu ńßuwa-ku anidit…ôkan tu nu kanatar~…ĺ a sausi kju tini mar~…ĺiŇčatu, sisa idaw kunu ńßu-wa-ku a imi. (point z*ro)***, . nu ńßuwa-ku a paŇčaŇčan sa "s…ôn-mu-jun" ńßan ui minida sa "u tatajna nu mita" sanaj , mutudu tu ¶i jisuan a wina s…ôn-mu-ma-r~…ĺi-ja, masasusikad ju siŇčaŇčan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôn i tipanaj a kanatar~…ĺ u kamu nuńß…ôni, wij-k…ô-tu.ji-ku anisur~…ĺitan tu ¶uda " mańßi ¶aaj a tad…ômaw" kju wijni ku sapaŇčaŇčan. s…ô-mu-jun jumańßidańß…ônaj matabar~…ĺ nu ajawan nu ¶ajs…ôp a siki sa, mar~…ĺanu pa-r~…ĺi tuwaj, atu maminaj nu pir~…ĺińßajan nu ńßu-wa-ku a kitidaan. . nika, jumańßida ńß…ônaj usutuduŇč, makat…ôpa ku tad…ômaw t us…ôn-s…ô-t…ô-waŇč a kiwkaj atu mamukun tu ¶ajaj katatuduŇč sa, ma ¶unus a ¶a tunu kiwkaj mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku d…ômiad mar~…ĺuman, kja mar~…ĺiŇčatu midat…ôŇč tu ańßi ¶an mur~…ĺijaw misaŇča tina kiwkaj sa. **** amińß ¶aan, par~…ĺi nu tuduŇč a kiwkaj mu-r~…ĺis…ô.t…ô. sur~…ĺi "mauri ¶…ô d…ô sur~…ĺr~…ĺj" patid…ôŇč par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ mikijaku, kju **** a mińß ¶aan sajawaj a patu ¶…ôk tu sapan…ôkn…ôk a ba…ôtu, Ňčj mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu a misaŇča tu kiwkaj. nika, u mańßiniaj aw ¶ima ku sasituŇčusaj a pat…ôkt…ôk tina s…ôn-mu jun jadańß ku kamu, ¶i mu-r~…ĺi-s…ô. t…ô. su-r~…ĺi u tatusijam…ôn nu tawjaaj a tad…ômaw, idaw kukamu sakamusa ¶i ¶ijaw- ¶uŇč ja-r~…ĺi-san-ta ku sisikiniŇčaj sa, nika ianajaj ku sur~…ĺit itawja, u s…ôn-mu-jun nu sajawaj numisaŇčaaj naw ¶ima ńßakija, inajaj ku tuŇčus tu nipisur~…ĺit. **** amińß ¶aan *taj abur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad ** kutuki ** a sasur~…ĺitan itawja, imańßida misaŇča tu tina pa-r~…ĺi s…ô-mu -jun makatuduńß, nikatuduńß mamin atuduńß ku badańßuŇč nu kiwkaj a tu masamu ¶u Ē~ °aj, nika u t…ôkt…ôk nu kiwkaj kapańß tu namiŇč. ukamu itawja, makatuduńß sa misaŇča tu a musumad . nikatuduńß naji r~…ĺabu nu kiwkaj a didiai a tumunaw sa. nadikudan nama katuduńßmir~…ĺijaw misaŇča*******patu ¶…ôk tu kamu ¶inid a mir~…ĺijaw a ¶a misaŇča tina pa-r~…ĺi-s…ôn-mu-jun sa, mikijaku tu r~…ĺim a mińß ¶aan amuńßamin masaŇča tinakawaw sa. mur~…ĺijaw misaŇča itawja t us…ôn-mu-jun u nar~…ĺimaan pad…ôŇč ńßan ńß…ônaj mur~…ĺimad tajda…ôn i r~…ĺu-ńßu-kuŇč a mikuwan. pakatin…ôŇč ¶inida amikawaw tu masas…ôts…ôt misaŇča sa, jakamunida majdińß mur~…ĺijaw mitadas misaŇča atu badańßuŇč. namańßida sa, patin…ôŇč tu sapisas…ôts…ôt sakar~…ĺamkam sa pakatin…ôŇč tu pańßusuaj nika patin…ôkuan, u mikuwanaj tu nisup…ôdan tu nami…ô ¶awaj a tad…ômaw mutudu Ē~ ° tu ńßuwa-ku a ¶…ôn-ńßu tadakar~…ĺankam a misumad tu tukuŇč sa, ¶aj pakaadińß tu sapisumad pasu maminaj a sasaŇčaan atu pisaŇčaan a d…ômiad u mi ¶ukajmasaj nu saj-ku ni ¶ar~…ĺiwajaj. **** a mińß ¶aan s…ôn-mu-jun nu timur~…ĺan nu kawijr~…ĺi atu namakatuduńß tu sakatu a d…ômiad i kawana, u tuŇčduńß nu s…ôn-mu-jun atu nu kir~…ĺaŇčaj a tukun mamin matuduńßnamańßida namakatuduńß sa ¶aj kat…ôn…ôs, ńßuwaku- ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i mak…ô-ńßuŇč**, . ina sapamata a bar~…ĺuńßaj a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ misakar~…ĺoamkam mar~…ĺiŇčatu mitadas, Ňčaj pa-r~…ĺi-s…ôn-mu-jun ku ¶aj ka idaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tu nipar~…ĺiwan sapisikur~…ĺ atu sapisumad nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ atu ńßi ¶a…ôn, imańßini sa ma ¶uduńß a ¶a mar~…ĺakuwijt ku **** nu r~…ĺiwan a zajsaŇč u nami…ô ¶awaj pasajda ¶i ma-k…ô-ńßuŇčan patigami tu nipańß…ôr~…ĺak, musakamu sasikadi ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sa. . ina r~…ĺutu ¶ nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ sa naji **** amińß ¶aan *aj abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad, misur~…ĺur~…ĺ, naji ńßu-wa-ku mir~…ĺubaŇč tunu kamu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺaj sa sakamusa pisar~…ĺar~…ĺamkami ti sikawaw atu mis…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu damsu Ňčaj mu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ tu kapańßaj ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu masakaputaj a pańßajkiw sa. natar~…ĺ ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw kuni kasa ¶a ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw.u ¶ajaj pisur~…ĺir~…ĺ ¶i mak…ôńßuŇčan sa mutudu Ē~ ° tu ¶…ôn-ńßu mir~…ĺijuŇč tu pa-r~…ĺi s…ôn-mu a kijkaj patar~…ĺuajaw tu kawaw nu ¶…ôn- ¶ Ē~ ° sa, u
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ś∑īťĽéŤĀĖśĮćťôĘpa-li sen-mu-yun nilaculan pa-li sen-mu-yun u imi nida pa-li sen-mu, u tatengaay nida a nganga sa pa-li sen-mu kitidaan nu kiwkay tini i hu-wa-ku-pa-li saka sip nu si-ti a subal nu tinsukiw a kiwkay, u tinsukiw a kitidaan nu kiwkay, nayi 1163 a mihcaan anisangaan katukih 1250 a mihcaan, nu ke-te-se aluma' nu huwalan-si a subal nu kitidaan nu ketese alalihayay nu kapahay a kitidaan, idaw kunisabaluhay nipisangan tu madicemay hida sikululay, tabaki yadah ku kulit hida nu balu ku sasingalan yadah ku kulit nalimaan misanga tu salining tini i pa-li mala mikutayay tu ngangan nu naemekan nu mukasi, tungusay tu aidangan atu lalihayan nu kitidaan. mangaleb nu huwa-ku matineng naming ku matinengayatademaw, tu mihmihcaan tayniay midang nu tademaw makaala tu cay tusepsep a emang ku tayniay midang tina pa-li sen-mu-yun, kyu mala pali sayadahay nu tayniay a aaidangan. . Sen-mu-yun i 1163 amihcaan i mulise.te.su-li a cu-ciyaw mukeliday malingatu misanga, nayi 1260 a mihcaan maedem namisanga tu kitidaan, kanahatu nadikuda pina tu a siki amisumad tu kawaw, nika i 1790 a mihcaan u huwa-ku malepacaw henay itawya, yapali-se-mu-yun macalap mapeci, kyu yadahay a kiwkay nu wayway mamin mapeci. nanu 19 a sikimalingatu, pasu ci na-pi-lun saka cay yu pakasitangah a pacuung sa nu lisin sa atu huwalan-si a kanatal atu katuuday a cung-tung yu pitademan nu cung-tung itini aca i sen-mu-yun a sikawaw. i sen-mu-yun nu panan ihekal putah nu sen-mu-yun sa, idaw ku nu sayaway a sapakining, nu huwa-ku aniditekan tu nu kanatal a sausi kyu tini malingatu, sisa idaw kunu hu-wa-ku a imi. (Point Z√©ro)ÁīÄŚŅĶÁČ©, . nu huwa-ku a pangangan sa "sen-mu-yun" han ui minida sa "u tatayna nu mita" sanay , mutudu tu ci yisuan a wina sen-mu-ma-li-ya, masasusikad yu singangan mangalen i tipanay a kanatal u kamu nuheni, wiy-ke-tu.yi-ku anisulitan tu cuda " mahicaay a tademaw" kyu wiyni ku sapangangan. se-mu-yun yumahidahenay matabal nu ayawan nu caysep a siki sa, malanu pa-li tuway, atu maminay nu pilihayan nu hu-wa-ku a kitidaan. . nika, yumahida henay usutudung, makatepa ku tademaw t usen-se-te-wang a kiwkay atu mamukun tu cayay katatudung sa, macunus aca tunu kiwkay malawpes ku demiad maluman, kya malingatu midateng tu ahican muliyaw misanga tina kiwkay sa. 1160 amihcaan, pali nu tudung a kiwkay mu-lise.te. suli "Maurice de Sully" patideng palekal mikiyaku, kyu 1163 a mihcaan sayaway a patucek tu sapaneknek a baetu, ngy malingatu tu a misanga tu kiwkay. nika, u mahiniay awcima ku sasitungusay a patektek tina sen-mu yun yadah ku kamu, ci mu-li-se. te. Su-li u tatusiyamen nu tawyaay a tademaw, idaw kukamu sakamusa ci ciyaw-cung ya-li-san-ta ku sisikiningay sa, nika ianayay ku sulit itawya, u sen-mu-yun nu sayaway numisangaay nawcima hakiya, inayay ku tungus tu nipisulit. 2019 amihcaan 4tay abulad 15 a demiad 18 kutuki 50 a sasulitan itawya, imahida misanga tu tina pa-li se-mu -yun makatuduh, nikatuduh mamin atuduh ku badahung nu kiwkay a tu masamucu'ay, nika u tektek nu kiwkay kapah tu naming. ukamu itawya, makatuduh sa misanga tu a musumad . nikatuduh nayi labu nu kiwkay a didiai a tumunaw sa. nadikudan nama katuduhmiliyaw misangaŚ§ßÁĀęťĀéŚĺĆÁöĄťáćŚĽļpatucek tu kamu cinid a miliyaw aca misanga tina pa-li-sen-mu-yun sa, mikiyaku tu lim a mihcaan amuhamin masanga tinakawaw sa. muliyaw misanga itawya t usen-mu-yun u nalimaan padeng han henay mulimad taydaen i lu-hu-kung a mikuwan. pakatineng cinida amikawaw tu masasetset misanga sa, yakamunida maydih muliyaw mitadas misanga atu badahung. namahida sa, patineng tu sapisasetset sakalamkam sa pakatineng tu pahusuay nika patinekuan, u mikuwanay tu nisupedan tu namiecaway a tademaw mutudu' tu huwa-ku a cen-hu tadakalankam a misumad tu tukung sa, cay pakaadih tu sapisumad pasu maminay a sasangaan atu pisangaan a demiad u micukaymasay nu say-ku nicaliwayay. 2009 a mihcaan sen-mu-yun nu timulan nu kawiyli atu namakatuduh tu sakatu a demiad i kawana, u tungduh nu sen-mu-yun atu nu kilangay a tukun mamin matuduhnamahida namakatuduh sa cay katenes, huwaku-cung-tung ci make-hungÁĄ∂ŤÄĆ, . ina sapamata a baluhay a hulic misakaloamkam malingatu mitadas, ngay pa-li-sen-mu-yun kucay ka idaw ku lalangawan tu nipaliwan sapisikul atu sapisumad nu hulic atu hicaen, imahini sa macuduh aca malakuwiyt ku 1170 nu liwan a zaysang u namiecaway pasayda ci ma-ke-hungan patigami tu nipahelak, musakamu sasikadi ku hulic sa. . Ina lutuc nu hulic sa nayi 2019 amihcaan 5ay abulad 11 ademiad, misulul, nayi hu-wa-ku milubang tunu kamuculculay sa sakamusa pisalalamkami ti sikawaw atu miselep tu damsu ngay muculcul tu kapahay ku balucu' nu masakaputay a pahaykiw sa. natal macalilaw kuni kasacacalilaw.u cayay pisulil ci makehungan sa mutudu' tu cen-hu miliyung tu pa-li sen-mu a kiykay pataluayaw tu kawaw nu cen-c' sa, u
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == *****pa-r~…ĺi s…ôn-mu-jun nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan pa-r~…ĺi s…ôn-mu-jun u imi nida pa-r~…ĺi s…ôn-mu, u tat…ôŇčaaj nida a ŇčaŇča sa pa-r~…ĺi s…ôn-mu kitidaan nu kiwkaj tini i ńßu-wa-ku-pa-r~…ĺi saka sip nu si-ti a subar~…ĺ nu tinsukiw a kiwkaj, u tinsukiw a kitidaan nu kiwkaj, naji **** a mińß ¶aan anisaŇčaan katukińß **** a mińß ¶aan, nu k…ô-t…ô-s…ô ar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßuwar~…ĺan-si a subar~…ĺ nu kitidaan nu k…ôt…ôs…ô ar~…ĺar~…ĺińßajaj nu kapańßaj a kitidaan, idaw kunisabar~…ĺuńßaj nipisaŇčan tu madi ¶…ômaj ńßida sikur~…ĺur~…ĺaj, tabaki jadańß ku kur~…ĺit ńßida nu bar~…ĺu ku sasiŇčar~…ĺan jadańß ku kur~…ĺit nar~…ĺimaan misaŇča tu sar~…ĺiniŇč tini i pa-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺa mikutajaj tu ŇčaŇčan nu na…ôm…ôkan nu mukasi, tuŇčusaj tu aidaŇčan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺińßajan nu kitidaan. maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb nu ńßuwa-ku matin…ôŇč namiŇč ku matin…ôŇčajatad…ômaw, tu mińßmińß ¶aan tajniaj midaŇč nu tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu ¶aj tus…ôps…ôp a …ômaŇč ku tajniaj midaŇč tina pa-r~…ĺi s…ôn-mu-jun, kju mar~…ĺa par~…ĺi sajadańßaj nu tajniaj a aaidaŇčan. . s…ôn-mu-jun i **** amińß ¶aan i mur~…ĺis…ô.t…ô.su-r~…ĺi a ¶u- ¶ijaw muk…ôr~…ĺidaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu misaŇča, naji **** a mińß ¶aan ma…ôd…ôm namisaŇča tu kitidaan, kanańßatu nadikuda pina tu a siki amisumad tu kawaw, nika i **** a mińß ¶aan u ńßuwa-ku mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ńß…ônaj itawja, japar~…ĺi-s…ô-mu-jun ma ¶ar~…ĺap map…ô ¶i, kju jadańßaj a kiwkaj nu wajwaj mamin map…ô ¶i. nanu ** a sikimar~…ĺiŇčatu, pasu ¶i na-pi-r~…ĺun saka ¶aj ju pakasitaŇčańß a pa ¶uuŇč sa nu r~…ĺisin sa atu ńßuwar~…ĺan-si a kanatar~…ĺ atu katuudaj a ¶uŇč-tuŇč ju pitad…ôman nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč itini a ¶a i s…ôn-mu-jun a sikawaw. i s…ôn-mu-jun nu panan ińß…ôkar~…ĺ putańß nu s…ôn-mu-jun sa, idaw ku nu sajawaj a sapakiniŇč, nu ńßuwa-ku anidit…ôkan tu nu kanatar~…ĺ a sausi kju tini mar~…ĺiŇčatu, sisa idaw kunu ńßu-wa-ku a imi. (point z*ro)***, . nu ńßuwa-ku a paŇčaŇčan sa "s…ôn-mu-jun" ńßan ui minida sa "u tatajna nu mita" sanaj , mutudu tu ¶i jisuan a wina s…ôn-mu-ma-r~…ĺi-ja, masasusikad ju siŇčaŇčan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôn i tipanaj a kanatar~…ĺ u kamu nuńß…ôni, wij-k…ô-tu.ji-ku anisur~…ĺitan tu ¶uda " mańßi ¶aaj a tad…ômaw" kju wijni ku sapaŇčaŇčan. s…ô-mu-jun jumańßidańß…ônaj matabar~…ĺ nu ajawan nu ¶ajs…ôp a siki sa, mar~…ĺanu pa-r~…ĺi tuwaj, atu maminaj nu pir~…ĺińßajan nu ńßu-wa-ku a kitidaan. . nika, jumańßida ńß…ônaj usutuduŇč, makat…ôpa ku tad…ômaw t us…ôn-s…ô-t…ô-waŇč a kiwkaj atu mamukun tu ¶ajaj katatuduŇč sur~…ĺi "mauri ¶…ô d…ô sur~…ĺr~…ĺj" patid…ôŇč par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ mikijaku, kju **** a mińß ¶aan sajawaj a patu ¶…ôk tu sapan…ôkn…ôk a ba…ôtu, Ňčj mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu a misaŇča tu kiwkaj. nika, u mańßiniaj aw
